message:
refactor(runtime): condense verbose lock().expect() calls in three_lane scheduler

Collapse multi-line .lock().expect("runtime state lock poisoned") and
.lock().expect("lock poisoned") patterns into single-line .lock().expect("poisoned")
forms in ThreeLaneWorker task completion and test code. Continues the parking_lot
migration cleanup by reducing unnecessary verbosity in lock acquisition sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
